body_txt: Every villain worth their salting-the-Earth has to have style . Not just because Evil Is Cool , but because otherwise, those idiot heroes wouldn't be able to tell us apart from the horde of clowns and hangers-on that follow them everywhere. This is especially critical for fledgling villains, one dark-fashion faux pas can haunt you for years, earning you nothing but ridicule from heroes, villains, and even Muggles ! Below are some suggestions to make your Jumping Off the Slippery Slope more visually obvious to those pathetic heroes.
